motivation: Wire AppShell's note-save flow to use NoteTagEditor so edited tags persist through the existing notes update API. Stage 2 of 3 (new then edit then delete): assumes note-tags-new is merged.

included: tags included in the note update payload

work_items.title: AppShell edit mode wires NoteTagEditor
work_items.contract: AppShell edit mode mounts <NoteTagEditor> and includes tags in the NoteUpdate request payload

assertions: editing tags and saving sends tags in the update request
read mode still shows tag chips with filter behavior intact
